text.message: I’m not competing for the sheep port green
it appears I did blue myself
Targeting me will only throw your game
Happens to the best of us
Fine by me, I’m not gonna win this anyway
I’d rather you throw your game than have a toxic player win
u’re the one who didn’t respect nb
this is also a very close game
do u know how nb works?
Between you and blue yes, he’s narrowed the gap
Yeah, and I didn’t owe u one
It’s a game between u and Oj and u rob me
It's between blue and yellow and yet we got blocked
Bob loblaw and I get along
That’s kind of what u said
did u blue urself as well?
I did i did in fact
ahh that’s why we get along
Simply had to hit u there
You’ve had to hit him practically this entire game
u won’t make it on my law blog
He probably thinks husband and wife can be arrested for the same crime
Two wood is any card for u red
No I am sadly not close lawblaw
no one’s talking to u black
At least I don’t get pity over an intelligent block lol
We need an age restriction on this game
well done blue u deserve it
Yeah you’ve been throwing a tantrum all game lol
